zh.Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾貝福 霍爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Boteler於1372年出生在英國藍卡爾貝福 霍爾時，他的父親Sir John Boteler44歲，母親Alice Plumpton37歲。他於1403年6月27日與Elizabeth Standish在英國英格蘭藍卡爾沃林頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1415年登記服兵役。他去世於1415年在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利哈福勒爾享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Boteler于1372年出生在英国藍卡爾貝福 霍爾时，他的父亲Sir John Boteler44岁，母亲Alice Plumpton37岁。他于1403年6月27日与Elizabeth Standish在英国英格兰藍卡爾沃林頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1415年登记服兵役。他去世于1415年在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利哈福勒爾享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: Boteler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a maker of leather bottles, from an agent derivative of Middle English botel, Old French bouteille ‘bottle’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Boteler was born in 1372, in Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir John Boteler, was 44 and his mother, Alice Plumpton, was 37. He married Elizabeth Standish on 27 June 1403, in Warrington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He registered for military service in 1415. He died in 1415, in Harfleur, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Boteler est né en 1372, à Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Boteler, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Alice Plumpton, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Standish le 27 juin 1403, à Warrington, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1415. Il est décédé en 1415, à Harfleur, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.Bewsey Hall, Warrington, Lancashire, Eng: Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Boteler 1372 in Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Boteler 44 und seine Mutter Alice Plumpton 37. Er hat am 27. Juni 1403 in Warrington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Standish geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er hat sich 1415 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1415 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Harfleur, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Boteler è nato il nel 1372 nel Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Boteler, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Alice Plumpton, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Standish il 27 giugno 1403, nel Warrington, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1415. Morì nel 1415, nel Harfleur, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Botelerが1372年にイギリスランカシュアイアベウセイ ハルで生まれた時，父Sir John Botelerは44歳，母Alice Plumptonは37歳であった。1403年6月27日にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアワーリントンでElizabeth Standishと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1415年に兵役登録をした。彼は1415年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメハーフレウルで43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Boteler(이)가 1372년 영국 랭카실르 뷰시 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Boteler(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Plumpton(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1403년 6월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 워링턴에서 Elizabeth Standish(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1415년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1415년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 하르플레우르에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Boteler nasceu em 1372, em Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Boteler, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Alice Plumpton, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Standish em 27 de junho de 1403, em Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1415. Ele faleceu em 1415, em Harfleur, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Boteler родился в 1372 г. в местности бюси холл, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Boteler было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Plumpton, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Standish 27 июня 1403 г. в местности варрингтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. В 1415 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1415 г. в местности харфлеур, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Boteler nació en 1372, en Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Boteler, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Alice Plumpton, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Standish el 27 de junio de 1403, en Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1415. Murió en 1415, en Harfleur, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 43 años.
